description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front features a central entryway with a small set of steps, a black door, and symmetrical windows on either side. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a backyard with a round above-ground pool, trees, and a swing set. The house has a driveway leading to a single-car garage on the right side, and the landscaping includes grass, shrubs, and paved walkways. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, and the roof is steeply pitched. The overall design is modern with colonial influences, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a fenced yard, and a backyard pool. The exterior is a mix of black and white with a central entryway and attached garage.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a round pool, trees, a swing set, and the rear facade with large windows and a patio area.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side and rear of the house, showing the white exterior, fenced yard, and the pool area from an angle.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the house with the main entryway, symmetrical windows, steps, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side and rear, emphasizing the black exterior, garage, and the backyard features.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with black door, small steps, and a simple porch without columns or overhangs
